𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗢𝟮𝗫 | Upscaling low-resolution videos and increasing the frame rate of existing videos using AI for improved visual quality.  🔥 Super Hot!

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Upscaling low-resolution videos and increasing the frame rate of existing videos using AI for improved visual quality.
📅 Created: Feb 2018 • Updated: Jun 2026

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Machine learning-based video super resolution
✅ Machine learning-based frame interpolation
✅ Rewrite in C/C++ for speed and efficiency
✅ Cross-platform support (Windows, Linux)
✅ Support for Anime4K v4, Real-ESRGAN, Real-CUGAN, RIFE
✅ GPU acceleration via Vulkan and ncnn
✅ New GUI and installer for Windows


⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 20.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.8K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 109 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Video2X is a C++ framework for enhancing video quality through machine learning. It offers super-resolution to upscale video resolution and frame interpolation to increase frame rates, utilizing advanced AI models and GPU acceleration.

⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬⚬

𝗖𝗟𝗢𝗨𝗗𝗣𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗘 | To provide a flexible, self-hosted, and serverless platform for managing and sharing files and text across various cloud storage providers, with integrated editing and preview capabilities.  🔍 Worth a Look

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a flexible, self-hosted, and serverless platform for managing and sharing files and text across various cloud storage providers, with integrated editing and preview capabilities.
📅 Created: Apr 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Serverless architecture with Cloudflare Workers, Workflow, and D1
✅ Support for multiple storage backends including S3-compatible, WebDAV, OneDrive, Google Drive, Telegram, HuggingFace, and GitHub
✅ Built-in Markdown editor with real-time preview and export options
✅ Direct preview for over 30 file formats
✅ Flexible deployment options: Cloudflare Workers or Docker
✅ Advanced upload features: pre-signed direct upload, streaming, chunked resumable uploads
✅ Scheduled tasks for maintenance and synchronization
✅ Unified visual management for multiple storage sources


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.6K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 33 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

CloudPaste is a serverless, self-hosted file management and text-sharing tool that aggregates multiple storage services. It offers a built-in Markdown editor, supports over 30 file format previews, and can be deployed via Cloudflare Workers or Docker.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ling-drag0n/CloudPaste

This repository provides a professional SVG logo generator that creates multiple design variants based on product characteristics. It also generates high-end showcase images with various professional background styles, leveraging Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview for refined presentations.

𝗠𝗫𝗙𝗜𝗡𝗗 | Discovering and searching public Matrix chat rooms across different homeservers.  

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Discovering and searching public Matrix chat rooms across different homeservers.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Search public Matrix rooms via `/_matrix/client/v3/publicRooms`
✅ Query multiple configured homeservers
✅ Store room metadata in a local SQLite index
✅ Use local search by default when the database exists
✅ Force live search when needed
✅ Print compact human-readable search results
✅ Print full JSON without truncating data
✅ Inspect a single indexed room by room ID or canonical alias
✅ Check homeserver availability with `mxfind status`
✅ Show live server status next to rooms in human-readable output
✅ Explore rooms through an experimental TUI with live search by default
✅ Async networking with Tokio and Reqwest


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 6 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 0 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

mxfind is a Rust-based command-line and terminal UI tool designed to discover public Matrix chat rooms. It allows users to query multiple Matrix homeservers, build a local SQLite index for fast searching, and output results in both human-readable and machine-readable JSON formats.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Sovinskii28/mxFind

𝗖𝗥𝗢𝗦𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗜𝗥𝗝𝗦 | To enhance website user experience by replacing the standard mouse cursor with an engaging, animated, and interactive custom cursor that provides visual feedback on hover.  

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enhance website user experience by replacing the standard mouse cursor with an engaging, animated, and interactive custom cursor that provides visual feedback on hover.
📅 Created: Jun 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Zero Markup - automatic style injection and DOM element handling
✅ Magnetic Hover - snaps and scales to links and buttons
✅ Customizable - control over colors, sizes, and blend modes
✅ Performance - smooth 60fps animation using RequestAnimationFrame
✅ MutationObserver - works with dynamic content and SPAs


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 8 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 0 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Crosshair.JS is a lightweight JavaScript library that replaces the default browser cursor with a customizable, animated crosshair. It offers smart hover effects that make the cursor magnetically snap and scale to interactive elements like links and buttons, enhancing user experience with smooth animations and visual feedback.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗥𝗘𝗠𝗢𝗧𝗘-𝗣𝗖-𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗚𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧 | Remote monitoring and management of computers within a local network or over the internet.

📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✅ Agent management (registration, status monitoring, deletion)
✅ Real-time shell/PowerShell command execution
✅ File upload and download
✅ System information gathering (OS, processes, services)
✅ WebSocket for real-time communication
✅ Web-based administrator panel
✅ Operation auditing and logging
✅ JWT authentication
✅ Automatic TLS/SSL certificate generation


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a full-featured system for remote monitoring and management of computers, featuring a Python/Flask server and a cross-platform Rust agent. It enables real-time command execution, file transfer, system monitoring, and administrative control through a web interface.
